lines.speaker: Ali the Mayor
lines.text: Welcome, adventurer, to the town of Pollnivneach, the gateway to Menaphos and Al Kharid. My name is Ali and I'm the mayor of this town. I hope you enjoy your stay here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you. That is one of the warmest welcomes I've ever had! People generally treat travelling adventurers with suspicion.

lines.speaker: Ali the Mayor
lines.text: All are welcome here. Now more than ever I suppose.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean by that?

lines.speaker: Ali the Mayor
lines.text: There's trouble in town, and a lot of villagers have left as a result. Things are looking dire.

lines.speaker: Hakeem the Mayor
lines.text: Thank you once again. Have you spoken to Ali Morrisane yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I spoke to him already. He really had me going with his little 'tourism' trick!

lines.speaker: Hakeem the Mayor
lines.text: Well, not to be immodest, but it was all my idea.

lines.speaker: Hakeem the Mayor
lines.text: Our little town needed help, and I knew it'd take the greatest salesman in Gielinor to attract an adventurer strong enough to help us out.

lines.speaker: Hakeem the Mayor
lines.text: In any case, I have my mayoral duties to attend to. I have lots of new citizens to register!
